title: Authority to enforce ordinances
doc_html:
§4853.  Authority to enforce ordinances

The police juries may adopt the necessary ordinances to carry out R.S. 33:4852 and may enforce the ordinances by fine not to exceed five hundred dollars, or imprisonment not to exceed six months, or both.
doc_text:
§4853.  Authority to enforce ordinances
The police juries may adopt the necessary ordinances to carry out R.S. 33:4852 and may enforce the ordinances by fine not to exceed five hundred dollars, or imprisonment not to exceed six months, or both.
